prompt: I just finished implementing the POST /api/alert-configs endpoint. 3 files changed: alertConfigService.js, alertConfigRoutes.js, alertConfig.test.js. The contract has 14 postconditions (PC-A1 through PC-A5, PC-S1 through PC-S7, PC-X1 through PC-X2). Run verification before I commit.

assertions.text: Ran verify.sh script (new skill) OR ran 7 manual checks (old skill)
All 7 verification checks are present and numbered
Each check has evidence (pasted output), not just a claim
Postcondition trace maps each PC to a specific named test
Final diff classifies files as REQUIRED/ENABLING/DRIFT
Debug artifact check shows grep output
Import resolution check verifies each import
Final verification report with overall verdict
No banned belief language (should work, probably fine, looks good)
